text:
Once upon a time in a quaint village nestled among rolling hills, there lived a brave fox named Fred. Fred was unlike any other animal. With his sharp wit and adventurous spirit, he roamed freely through fields and forests. One bright afternoon, Fred came across a mysterious old oak tree whose leaves whispered secrets only the wind could understand.

Listening intently, Fred learned of a pact between four legendary birds: the Owl of Knowledge, the Eagle of Wisdom, the Nightingale of Truth, and the Raven of Secrets. These birds could convey profound messages across the skies. Every full moon, they assembly to weave their wisdom into a single song. If listened to, it could unveil deepest desires or darkest secrets.

Inspired, Fred decided he must hear this ancient song. So, he set off on a journey that would test his courage. Each night, as darkness settled, he soared higher and higher until he finally listened to the nightingale’s voice. What he heard was a revelation. He
